description: Ticket dashboard shows a `Move to Board` bulk action when one or more tickets are selected and the user can update tickets.
Invoking `Move to Board` opens a bulk move dialog that lists the selected tickets and provides destination board and status controls.
The bulk move dialog loads only statuses valid for the selected destination board.
Selecting a destination board automatically preselects that board's default status in the bulk move dialog.
The bulk move dialog allows the user to override the preselected destination status with another valid status for that board.
The bulk move dialog disables confirmation until a destination board and valid destination status are available and while the move is processing.
A bulk move server action processes selected tickets individually and returns moved ids plus per-ticket failures.
For each successful bulk move, the ticket's `board_id` is updated to the chosen destination board.
For each successful bulk move, the ticket's `status_id` is updated to the user-selected or default status valid for the destination board.
For each successful bulk move, the ticket's `category_id` and `subcategory_id` are cleared.
The server-side bulk move path enforces ticket update permission checks for each ticket.
The server-side bulk move path rejects destination statuses that are not valid for the selected destination board.
On partial success, the bulk move dialog stays open, shows per-ticket failure messages, and keeps only failed tickets selected.
On full success, the bulk move dialog closes and clears the current selection.
After successful moves, the dashboard refreshes or updates so tickets no longer matching the current filters are removed from view.
